# Federal Register API - Data Agreement

## Provider
Office of the Federal Register, National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) / Government Publishing Office (GPO)

## URL
https://www.federalregister.gov/developers/documentation/api/v1

## Terms of Service URL
https://www.federalregister.gov/reader-aids/developer-resources (terms on developer page)

## License
Public Domain (US government data)

## Data We Collect
Federal agency rules, proposed rules, notices, executive orders, and presidential documents via the Federal Register API. Includes document metadata, full text, agency information, CFR references, and regulatory timelines.

## How We Use It
Regulatory signal in DRM3 products. Federal Register data provides real-time regulatory activity context. Used to track rulemakings, enforcement actions, and policy changes relevant to technology, finance, and data governance sectors.

## Commercial Use
Yes. Public domain data with no restrictions on commercial use.

## Redistribution
Yes. Public domain data may be freely redistributed in any form. The API is designed for public consumption and reuse.

## Attribution Required
No. Public domain data has no enforceable attribution requirement. Best practice: cite "Federal Register, federalregister.gov" as the data source.

## Rate Limits
- No API key required
- No documented hard rate limits, but reasonable use expected
- Bulk data available via separate bulk download endpoints

## Key Restrictions
- No key restrictions on data use
- Do not misrepresent content as official government communications when it is derived/modified
- Reasonable request frequency expected

## Last Reviewed
2026-04-02
